name: Unauthorized USB/pendrive attached
description: Any USB storage device plugged in without prior approval from lab administrator.

name: Multiple USB insertions in short window
description: More than 2 USB devices plugged/unplugged within 10 minutes on the same machine.

name: Data copied to USB drive
description: File copy or write operation detected to USB storage device.

name: Executable file on USB attempted to run
description: .exe, .bat, .sh, .py launched directly from a USB mount point.

name: Mobile phone connected as MTP/storage
description: Android or iOS device mounted as file transfer storage.

name: CD/DVD drive accessed
description: Optical disc drive opened or read during class session.

name: USB mouse/keyboard (non-whitelisted)
description: Non-inventory USB HID device detected — may be a rubber ducky or keylogger.

name: USB device removed without ejection
description: Unsafe removal detected; may indicate hurried data exfiltration.

name: Online gaming site accessed
description: Access to Steam, Miniclip, Friv, Poki, Coolmathgames, Y8, or similar gaming portals.

name: Browser-based game detected in active tab
description: Canvas-heavy WebGL game loop detected in browser tab during class hours.

name: Game download attempted
description: Game launcher installer or .exe download from Epic, Origin, Battle.net.

name: Video streaming site accessed (non-educational)
description: YouTube (non-edu), Netflix, Prime Video, Hotstar accessed during class.

name: Social media accessed
description: Social networking platforms accessed during active class session.

name: Gambling / betting website accessed
description: Any domain flagged as gambling, fantasy sports betting, or lottery.

name: Adult content website attempted
description: Request to adult/NSFW domain detected by DNS/proxy filter.

name: Meme / time-waste site accessed
description: Non-educational, entertainment-heavy forums browsed during class.

name: Music streaming in background
description: Audio streaming service active during class hours.

name: Short video app accessed
description: Short-form video platforms accessed via web browser.

name: Malware / phishing URL visited
description: URL matches threat intelligence feed or Google Safe Browsing blocklist.

name: Tor / anonymizer network access attempted
description: Attempt to connect to Tor entry nodes, VPN tunnel, or proxy bypass tools.

name: Hacking tool download attempted
description: Kali tools, Metasploit, Nmap installers downloaded or attempted.

name: Port scanning tool executed
description: nmap, Angry IP Scanner, or similar network scanner ran on LAN.

name: VPN client installed or run
description: Commercial or open-source VPN client (NordVPN, OpenVPN, Psiphon) detected running.

name: Cryptocurrency mining process detected
description: High CPU + GPU usage matching known mining patterns (xmrig, browser miner).

name: Remote desktop tool installed
description: Remote access client installed or connection established to external host.

name: Suspicious script execution
description: Non-standard scripts executed outside approved list in user profile.

name: Password manager or credential harvester pattern
description: Mimikatz-like behavior or bulk credential file access detected.

name: Unauthorized Wi-Fi hotspot created
description: PC attempted to broadcast a Wi-Fi hotspot, bypassing wired lab network.

name: Student PC idle during active session
description: No mouse/keyboard input for more than 5 minutes during a live class.

name: Student attempted to lock/log off PC
description: Ctrl+Alt+Del, Windows lock, or logoff triggered outside designated end-of-session.

name: Two students sharing one login credential
description: Same user account logged in from two different machines simultaneously.

name: Student accessed teacher's machine directory
description: Network share of teacher PC accessed from a student workstation.

name: Copy-paste from external source during exam
description: Large clipboard paste event detected during examination session.

name: Screen capture during exam
description: Print Screen, Snipping Tool, or screenshot app used during examination.

name: Voice/audio playback without headphones policy
description: Speaker output detected in silent lab session (non-headphone audio).

name: Unauthorized software installation attempted
description: Setup.exe or installer run that is not on the approved software list.

name: Software uninstalled by student
description: Add/Remove Programs or silent uninstall command detected from student account.

name: Chat client running
description: WhatsApp Web, Telegram, Discord active in browser or as installed app during class.

name: Email client accessed for non-academic purpose
description: Personal Gmail, Hotmail accessed and time spent exceeds 5 minutes.

name: Task Manager or Registry Editor opened
description: Attempt to open taskmgr.exe, regedit.exe, or msconfig from student account.

name: Command prompt / PowerShell opened
description: cmd.exe or powershell.exe launched from student-level account.

name: Browser extension installed without approval
description: New Chrome/Firefox extension added that is not on the approved list.

name: Cracked / keygen software detected
description: File or process name matching known crack/keygen patterns in filesystem.

name: Screen recording software launched
description: OBS, Bandicam, or similar recording software started on student PC.

name: Password change attempted by student
description: Student account attempted to change Windows login password.

name: Excessive bandwidth usage
description: Non-class related download or upload exceeding 50MB in 5 min threshold.

name: P2P / torrent client active
description: BitTorrent, uTorrent, or P2P traffic signature detected on network.

name: Access to dark web / .onion domains
description: DNS request to .onion TLD or known Tor exit node IP.

name: PC connected to unauthorized external server
description: Outbound connection to non-whitelisted IP or domain.

name: ARP spoofing or MAC flooding detected
description: Abnormal ARP broadcast pattern suggesting man-in-the-middle attempt.

name: Student PC pinging other student PCs repeatedly
description: ICMP flood or repeated ping sweep across lab subnet.

name: File sharing over LAN without permission
description: Network shared folder created by student machine detected.

name: DNS over HTTPS (DoH) bypass attempt
description: Encrypted DNS queries to Cloudflare/Google bypassing lab DNS filter.

name: SSH/Telnet outbound connection from student PC
description: Outbound port 22 or 23 traffic from a student-role machine.

name: Unusually high number of failed login attempts to server
description: More than 5 failed attempts to lab server or domain controller.

name: PC power button pressed during class session
description: Unscheduled shutdown or restart initiated from power button or Windows.

name: Monitor unplugged or display connection severed
description: Display signal lost unexpectedly mid-session.

name: Keyboard/mouse tampered with
description: USB HID device swap or additional device attached to student PC.

name: Webcam enabled without permission
description: Camera device accessed by a process outside approved list.

name: Microphone accessed without permission
description: Microphone input opened by unapproved application.

name: Network cable swapped between PCs
description: Physical topology change detected (LLDP/CDP neighbor change on switch port).

name: Multiple failed login attempts
description: 5 or more consecutive failed login attempts on a single PC.

name: Generic or shared account used
description: Login with 'student', 'user', 'guest', or other shared credentials.

name: Administrator account accessed from student PC
description: Admin-level account logged in from a student workstation position.

name: Auto-login or remembered password used
description: Browser or OS remembered credentials used to bypass authentication.

name: Session token theft / cookie replay suspected
description: Same session token seen from two different IP addresses simultaneously.

name: Bulk file deletion detected
description: More than 20 files deleted within 2 minutes from any directory.

name: Sensitive file type accessed
description: Database dumps or spreadsheet files containing PII opened outside admin account.

name: File renamed with double extension
description: Classic malware masking technique — executable hiding as image/doc.

name: Large file upload to cloud
description: More than 10MB uploaded to cloud storage during class session.

name: Recycle bin emptied during session
description: Permanent deletion of files including recycle bin purge from student account.

name: System file modified
description: Any write operation to OS system directories from a student account.

name: Encrypted archive created
description: Password-protected archive created — possible attempt to hide exfiltrated data.

name: Clipboard contains sensitive data pattern
description: Clipboard content matches credit card, Aadhaar, or password pattern.

name: AI tool accessed
description: Browser tab with generative AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot) opened

name: Question paper photo captured
description: Camera app or scanner software activated

name: WhatsApp or messaging active
description: Messaging apps or browser tabs with chat services detected

name: Paraphrasing / plagiarism-check site accessed
description: Quillbot, Grammarly, Spinbot, Turnitin accessed

name: Programming answer site accessed
description: Stack Overflow, GitHub Copilot, GeeksForGeeks during closed-book coding exam
